events.title: LoL: Hanwha Life Esports vs T1 (BO3) - Esports World Cup Playoffs

evidence_status: public anonymous aggregated CLOB levels and public taker-trade price/size/side/timestamps; not Sybil order flow; public timestamps have one-second resolution; MM identities and budgets are synthetic

selection.event_window_selection: maximum trade count, then distinct markets, total quantity, and recency

transformation.cases: one observed-flow budgeted case per category event, one untouched raw fragmented portfolio, and one budgeted portfolio that composes the six event-local public windows
transformation.observed_batch_arrivals: each event uses its densest retained aligned public trade window; asset token selects YES/NO, taker BUY/SELL selects order side, and observed execution price and size become limit and quantity; the portfolio composes the six event-local windows
transformation.price: decimal token price rounded to nearest nanodollar
transformation.public_depth: YES/NO token bids and asks become anonymous one-hot buy/sell orders
transformation.quantity: decimal shares floored to 0.001-share protocol units
transformation.synthetic_mm_overlay: two shared-budget MMs quote each retained token at the public touch and one tick wider; base budget is total worst-case quote capital
